prompt: Professional construction site hoarding/signage for 'LK Design and Build', a premium home renovation company in Adelaide. A large branded construction hoarding panel installed at an active residential renovation site. The hoarding is white with the LK monogram and 'LK DESIGN AND BUILD' branding in charcoal and gold, along with 'Premium Home Renovations', the phone number '0401 061 246' and website 'lkdesignandbuild.com.au'. The design is clean and premium — not cheap or busy. Behind the hoarding, partial view of scaffolding and a residential home under renovation. In front, a clean footpath and residential street with mature trees. Adelaide suburban setting. Photographed at midday with clear blue sky, 24mm wide lens, f/8, ISO 200, sharp focus throughout. The hoarding panels are clean and new-looking. Professional construction site with proper safety measures visible.
negative_prompt: blurry, damaged, dirty, graffiti, cheap, ugly, cluttered, industrial wasteland, dark, night, rain, cartoon, text errors

settings.camera_angle: eye level, slight angle to hoarding
